channel.title: Building Reliable Backend Systems on My Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Building Reliable Backend Systems on My Portfolio

item.title: Developer
item.description:
• Developed and styled website for clients. Mostly used Zurb Foundation, SCSS and JS.
  • Worked with SilverStripe CMS.
  • Colaborated with designer and other developers.

item.title: Site Monitor
item.description: A website uptime monitoring web app built with Go and PostgreSQL. Users can add sites for monitoring and receive Slack notifications when a site goes down.

item.title: Developer
item.description:
• Develop and style Websites.
  • Primarily we use wordpress (roots.io)
  • Tailwindcss for styling
  • Create Email Templates that are compatible with major clients.

item.title: SICP(JS) Excercise 1.10 explanation
item.description:
The following procedure computes a mathematical function called Ackermann’s function.

function A(x, y) {
 return y === 0
 ? 0
 : x === 0
 ? 2 * y
 : y === 1
 ? 2
 : A(x - 1, A(x, y - 1));
}

What are the values of the following expressions?

A (1, 10)

A(2, 4)

A(3, 3)

Consider the following procedures, where A is the procedure defined above:

function f(n) {
 return A(0, n);
}

function g(n) {
 return A(1, n);
}

function h(n) {
 return A(2, n);
}

Solutions
